## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. ENAIRE NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE SPAIN CONTINENTAL EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

ENAIRE reported a net gain of +23.4 M€, as a combination of a gain of +12.6 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +17.6 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a loss of -6.9 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **ER1.3.2. ENAIRE OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the en route activity mentioned above (+23.4 M€) and the actual RoE (+35.0 M€), amounts to +58.3 M€ (8.5% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 13.6%, which is higher than the 8.2% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **ER2. EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE - SPAIN CANARIAS**
